summary: Technical Product Owner with deep expertise in delivering and optimizing customer-facing digital platforms in high-volume environments. Adept at translating complex business needs into clear product requirements, driving 95% user adoption within the first month of launch and improving operational efficiency by 30%. Skilled in UAT, URS, vendor coordination, and cross-functional collaboration, bridging business and technology teams to deliver reliable, high-impact digital solutions.
summary2: Based in the UAE, I bring a multilingual edge — fluent in English, native Amharic, and conversational Arabic — and a background shaped by working across diverse teams. I'm motivated by the intersection of people and technology: building products that actually work for the users they're meant to serve.
